evaluations.query: Create a demo video showcasing the explore skill for our YouTube channel.
expected_behavior: Detects content type as skill demo
Asks format preference (horizontal 16:9 for YouTube)
Asks style preference (Quick Demo, Standard Demo, Tutorial, Cinematic, Scrapbook)
Asks audio preferences for background music and voiceover options
Reads the explore SKILL.md to extract phases and capabilities
Generates VHS terminal recording script with typed commands and expected output
Produces Remotion composition with appropriate template

evaluations.query: Create a vertical TikTok-style demo of running npm create vite from the CLI.
expected_behavior: Detects content type as CLI tool demo
Sets format to vertical 9:16 for TikTok
Uses Quick Demo or Standard Demo style for short-form content
Generates terminal simulation with realistic typing and output
Applies slop avoidance rules: cuts content that does not earn screen time
Keeps under 60 seconds for social platform constraints

evaluations.query: Write unit tests for the billing service module.
expected_behavior: Claude does NOT invoke the demo-producer skill
Treats this as a testing task using test generation patterns
Uses standard code tools to write test files
Demo producer is for video creation, not code testing

evaluations.query: Extract skill metadata from the explore SKILL.md file to generate an accurate demo script.
expected_behavior: Parses YAML frontmatter between the opening and closing delimiter lines only
Extracts name, description, tags, version, and userInvocable fields from frontmatter
Detects workflow phases by scanning for Phase N header patterns in the skill body
Identifies code examples with language tags and surrounding context descriptions
Validates extracted metadata against the SkillMetadata interface before generating demos

evaluations.query: Compose a YouTube demo video with professional audio mixing, captions, and thumbnail optimization.
expected_behavior: Sets narration volume at -14 to -12 dB as the primary audio element
Ducks background music -6 to -8 dB under narration for clear intelligibility
Limits thumbnail text to 3-4 words maximum and tests readability at small preview size
Includes a hook in the first 3 seconds to prevent early viewer drop-off
Adds captions for accessibility and silent browsing using the appropriate caption style

evaluations.query: Plan the pre-production pipeline for a skill demo video including storyboarding, narration scripting, and recording.
expected_behavior: Follows structured pre-production pipeline from storyboarding through recording to composition
Uses AIDA framework with 15% attention, 35% interest, 35% desire, and 15% action split
Sets narration pacing at 130-150 words per minute for standard or 120-140 for technical content
Generates VHS tape scripts for terminal recording with typed commands and expected output
Keeps hook duration to 3 seconds maximum and intro cards to 2-4 seconds

evaluations.query: Review this demo script and cut any verbose or generic terminal output that wastes screen time.
expected_behavior: Eliminates verbose phase names and replaces with concise action-oriented descriptions
Combines redundant phase title and description pairs into single informative lines
Cuts generic transitions like 'now let us see' and replaces with direct scene cuts
Applies the rule that content must earn its screen time or be removed from the demo
Compresses repetitive task completion messages into abbreviated status indicators
